text:
The certification must be complete prior to when an HHA bills Medicare for 
reimbursement; however, physicians and allowed practitioners should complete the 
certification when the plan of care is established, or as soon as possible thereafter. This is 
longstanding CMS policy as referenced in Pub 100-01, Medicare General Information, 
Eligibility, and Entitlement Manual, chapter 4, section 30.1. It is not acceptable for 
HHAs to wait until the end of a 60-day certification period to obtain a
